summary: S2-DAY-TICK + multi-fix regression sweep: PASS 5/5. S2-DAY-TICK-FIX verified (CARDS_PER_DAY=5, day increments every 5 cards in resolve_choice()). BUG-SFX-MISSING-SOUNDS verified (7 sounds gen_+registered+routed). BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX stable. BUG-PROMISE-SYSTEM-FIX stable. S2-BIOMES intervals stable. 2 known-pending items (not regressions). 0 new bugs. Added 3 test tasks to queue.

checks.name: S2-DAY-TICK-FIX: CARDS_PER_DAY constant + day increment logic
checks.detail: merlin_constants.gd:76 — const CARDS_PER_DAY := 5. store_run.gd lines 146-149: cards_played incremented, cp=new value, if cp>0 and cp%CARDS_PER_DAY==0 then run['day']+=1. Day starts at 1 (init_run:19). Progression: card 5→day 2, card 10→day 3. days_survived propagated to all 3 run-end code paths (lines 210, 230, 247, 272). LLM context will now show correct day value.
checks.invariant: run['day'] increments from 1 to N as cards_played crosses multiples of 5

checks.name: BUG-SFX-MISSING-SOUNDS: 7 game-flow sounds registered and routed
checks.detail: All 7 gen_ methods present in sfx_recipes_ambient.gd: gen_card_reveal(642), gen_confirm(659), gen_encounter(674), gen_success(694), gen_fail(710), gen_neutral(725), gen_danger(738). All 7 listed in SFXManager._generate_all_sounds() names[] at line 161. Volume routing correct (lines 127-131): card_reveal/confirm/neutral→ui, encounter/danger→magic, success/fail→transition. CHECK-7 from S4-SFXMANAGER-AUDIT (FAIL_MEDIUM) now resolved.
checks.invariant: All SFXManager.play() callers have a matching gen_ method + names[] entry

checks.name: BUG-SIGNAL-DELTA-FIX regression: actual_delta not raw rep_delta
checks.detail: merlin_store.gd lines 596-600: old_rep captured BEFORE _apply_faction_reputation() call. actual_delta = new_val - old_rep. reputation_changed emits (faction, new_val, actual_delta). Example: rep=95, delta=+20 → new_val=100 (capped), actual_delta=+5 (not +20). Signal consumers receive the clamped truth.
checks.invariant: reputation_changed.delta reflects the actual state change, not the requested delta

checks.name: BUG-PROMISE-SYSTEM-FIX regression: active_promises + card-based deadlines
checks.detail: _add_promise() lines 240-261: writes to run['active_promises']. _create_promise() lines 266-288: writes to run['active_promises']. check_promise_deadlines() lines 295-311: reads from run.get('active_promises'). All use made_at_card + deadline_cards (card-based, cards_played IS incremented). No stale run.promises key access. No day-based deadline (run.day was frozen at 1 before this sprint).
checks.invariant: Promise write, read, and expiry all use 'active_promises' key with card-based deadlines

checks.name: S2-BIOMES regression: all 8 biomes card intervals vs bible s.4.3
checks.detail: foret: 12-15, landes: 8-10, cotes: 6-8, villages: 8-10, cercles: 10-12, marais: 4-6, collines: 10-12, iles: 3-15. All match bible s.4.3. Arc IDs intact. arc_condition_types: runs_in_biome (landes), fins_vues (collines) present. Regression of S2-BIOMES stable.
checks.invariant: All 8 biomes have card_interval_range_{min,max} matching bible s.4.3 and arc data from s.3.6

checks.name: Anam death formula: ADD_ANAM scope check
checks.detail: _apply_add_anam() (line 433-444): credits BOTH run['anam'] AND meta['anam'] immediately. calculate_run_rewards() (line 331-376): death_ratio = min(cards_played/30, 1.0) applied ONLY to base reward (ANAM_BASE + bonuses). Card-effect Anam (ADD_ANAM) bypasses the death multiplier entirely. apply_run_rewards() (line 379-389): ADDS reward to existing meta['anam'] — so ADD_ANAM credits are permanent and stack additively with the scaled reward. Director question q-20260414-001 covers this design choice (pending).
checks.notes: BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX (P10) in queue but correctly blocked on director decision. Not a regression — state unchanged since last cycle.

known_pending.note: Not a regression — task in queue

known_pending.item: mg_meditation.gd still exists + registry entry at minigame_registry.gd:66+138
known_pending.note: Not a regression — task pending, director decision applied (delete option)
